allow: Bash(python -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: obj = json.loads\(line\) content = obj.get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 5: print\('---'\) print\(content[:400]\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text' and len\(c.get\('text',''\)\) > 5: print\('---'\) print\(c['text'][:400]\) ")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mammoth'\);m.convertToHtml\({path:'LME Flebologische aandoeningen samenvatting.docx'}\).then\(r=>{const t=r.value.replace\(/<[^>]+>/g,' '\).replace\(/\\s+/g,' '\).trim\(\);console.log\('Current words: '+t.split\(' '\).length\)}\)")
